title: crotalaria shevaroyensis
intro: Crotalaria shevaroyensis, also known as Shevaroy crotalaria, is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae, native to the Shevaroy Hills in India. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria shevaroyensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to treat digestive issues and skin infections. Crotalaria shevaroyensis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, or powders, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
